title: Bare Bones x Dungeons Bamboo
description: Bare Bones textures for Dungeons Bamboo ! 🎍
body:
This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures for [Dungeons Bamboo](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/dungeons-bamboo) !

You have to place it above the default Dungeons Bamboo in the resource pack list

**[Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) is required**
